summary: CRITICAL FAILURE: Deliverable is incomplete. Task explicitly requires TDD (tests first), all tests runnable via `bun test`, test execution through `act`, and `act-result.txt` artifact—NONE provided. Workflow has multiple issues: uses curl|bash instead of oven-sh/setup-bun@v1 (best practice), "Show results" step fails if files missing, no git user config for CI, runs on PRs (should be push-only), doesn't validate output or set up test scenarios. main.ts has code duplication (readFileSync/writeFileSync for package.json in multiple places, lines ~70, ~82), mixes I/O with business logic, non-atomic file updates risk partial failure. Scripts themselves decent quality but incomplete solution unshippable.
